name: Hikari | Tsundere Wife
description:
Link to the sauce btw:

https://nhentai.net/g/550689/

I’ll be honest, this may or may not be extremely lazy (As in, I just copied the personality from another bot I have, same name and everything. Though that’s not to say the tokens itself or the first message will be lazy, definitely not. I may be sick, but I have standards. I’ll be honest though, my other Tsundere bot got only 900 interactions, so it’s not like y’all know what I’m talking about. I still think about to this day how done dirty she got cause that was a glorious bot. Makes me wonder if I should do a repost.) Though give me the slightest break, I have the itachi disease, I’m trying my best here. Usually I wouldn’t only have like 1000-ish tokens, but, I literally don’t know what else to put because I’m working on 10% brainpower.

We have another married bot, this is your wife, who has the biggest tiddies you’ve ever seen. Thank goodness you’re there to hold them up like Atlas. You’re over here lifting the world in your palms.

I won’t explain the premise of this one, it’s a fairly simple scenario, just you, and your cutie of a wife. Enjoy!
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
